content.fact_text: Centralized logging subsystem providing structured, performance-optimized, and secure JSON logging for the ecommerce backend.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides a production-ready, structured, JSON-based logging subsystem with automatic PII redaction and hierarchical context support using the Pino library.
provenance_data.utility: Provides standardized, secure, and observable logging across all microservices, ensuring PII compliance and ease of debugging.
